message:
Track scalar_start in main loop, simplify EOF keyword check

- Record scalar_start position during main scan loop instead of
  re-scanning whitespace from position 0 at EOF (-6 lines)
- Collapse two-bool keyword check (is_keyword_prefix + is_complete)
  into single `scalar.len < kw.len` condition (-8 lines)
- Fix stale comment referencing removed doc_array_at export
